title: No Office Hours Today - Review Session FRIDAY & Past Exams
content:
Hi Class,

I will hold a review session to look at old exams, collect past note sheets (if available), and review last minute questions you have. 

1) No Monday Office Hours. As such, I am cancelling my office hours today (No office hours Monday, 12/1). 

2) REVIEW SESSION FRIDAY.

Time: Friday, 12/5, 8:00a - 10:45a

Room: KOBL 317

Bring a computer.

Best,

Jeremiah
